mnemonics: Mastering Blockchain by Imran Bashir is the key to unlocking the chain (Master Bashir Blocks the Chain)
keyPoints: Provides a comprehensive technical overview of blockchain fundamentals
Covers consensus mechanisms, cryptography, and distributed ledger technology
Includes practical implementation examples and use cases beyond cryptocurrency
commonMistakes: Confusing the title as 'Mastring' instead of the correct 'Mastering'
Assuming the book is only about Bitcoin or Ethereum, rather than broader blockchain concepts
Overlooking the deep technical and mathematical content in favor of just the high-level ideas
